title: Yale Replacement Rim Cylinder, Polished Brass, 2 Keys, Suitable for 38-57 mm Doors
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Rim Cylinder: Yale B-1109-PB Replacement Rim Cylinder is a convenient everyday locking solution
Suggested Use: The cylinder provides key access from only one side of the door and can be used on any nightlatch
Standard Security: Easy fit product that provides a standard level of security
Dimension and Colour: The lock fits doors with 38mm to 57mm thickness and comes in a Polished Brass finish
Keys Supplied: Supplied with 2 standard Yale keys. Additional replacement keys can be ordered from a locksmith
description: From the manufacturer 1109 Rim Cylinder Replacement rim cylinder for use with nightlatches Provides key access from one side of the door Suitable for doors 38-57mm thick Bump Resistant Supplied with 2 keys Yale X5 Kitemarked Rim Cylinder Yale 1109 Rim Cylinder Yale Cylinder Pull Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 317 4.7 out of 5 stars 1,786 — Yale Security Rating High Standard Standard Approved by BSI Kitemarked and Secured by Design ✓ X X Properties Anti-Bump, Anti-Pick and Anti-Drill X X Colours Available Brass/Chrome Brass/Chrome Brass/Chrome Number of Keys 2 2 X Compatible with Any nightlatch brand Any nightlatch brand 1109 Rim Cylinders
